title: Non Profit Sales Tax Exemptions (Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

A list of all currently-valid Texas state tax exemption certificates issued 
to nonprofit organizations under Texas Tax Code Sections 151.310, 151.317, 
or any related exemption authority. 

As of date: whatever is convenient for the office. As fresh as reasonable, or maybe at year end/start.

For each organization, please include where available:
- Organization name
- Employer Identification Number (EIN)  
- Mailing address (city, state, ZIP minimum)
- Certificate number
- Date of original issuance
- Exemption category (e.g., charitable, religious, educational)
- Current status (active, expired, revoked)

Please provide this data in CSV or other machine-readable format if possible.

If any fee is anticipated above $50, please notify me before proceeding so we can 
discuss scope adjustments.

The Texas Comptroller already publishes individual organization status via 
the public Tax-Exempt Entity Search tool 
(https://comptroller.texas.gov/taxes/exempt/search.php), demonstrating that 
this data is treated as public at the individual-organization level. This 
request seeks the same information in bulk format for efficiency.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

non-profit-researcher
